arguments.command:
# Debug: check symbol table content format
head -5 /tmp/symbols/allsyms.txt
echo "---"
# Check if addresses are in range
aarch64-linux-gnu-nm /tmp/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so.debug 2>/dev/null | awk '$2 ~ /[tT]/' | sort | tail -5
echo "---"
# Use a Python script to resolve
python3 -c "
import subprocess, re

# Get all symbols
result = subprocess.run(
    ['aarch64-linux-gnu-nm', '-n', '/tmp/symbols/libmonosgen-2.0.so.debug'],
    capture_output=True, text=True
)

symbols = []
for line in result.stdout.strip().split('\n'):
    parts = line.split()
    if len(parts) >= 3 and parts[1] in ('t', 'T'):
        addr = int(parts[0], 16)
        name = parts[2]
        symbols.append((addr, name))

symbols.sort()

targets = [0x222098, 0x2241ac, 0x1abc80, 0x16de04, 0x2f4b20, 0x2f4c84, 0x2c1a40]

for target in targets:
    best = None
    for addr, name in symbols:
        if addr <= target:
            best = (addr, name)
        else:
            break
    if best:
        offset = target - best[0]
        print(f'0x{target:x} => {best[1]}+0x{offset:x} (base 0x{best[0]:x})')
    else:
        print(f'0x{target:x} => ??')
"
